title: senna charlesiana
intro: Senna charlesiana, also known as Charles' senna, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative and purgative, due to its high content of anthraquinones, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna charlesiana include its ability to promote digestive health, alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and even help manage weight by regulating bowel movements. Herbal preparations of Senna charlesiana can be found in the form of tea, capsules, or powder, often used as a natural remedy for constipation and digestive issues.
